title: Make Live Register projections history-complete
goal: Separate bounded raw-history display from complete current-state projection so active focus, overrides, candidates and conflicts remain visible after unrelated history growth.

acceptance.assertion: Current thread focus, focus override and candidate state is derived from complete event coverage rather than the displayed history window.
live-list, context, repo context and conflict reports expose coverage_complete, history_truncated, oldest_loaded_event_id and projection_source.
Conflict reporting emits a blocker whenever current-state projection coverage is incomplete.
what-now and repo-balls retain older active focus and candidate state without treating it as queue or claim authority.
Deterministic tests exceed 100 events and cover complete projection plus fail-closed incomplete coverage.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
